items.caption: A stick of dynamite with a label that reads "dynamite (cont)" in bold letters at the top. below the label, there is a bullet-pointed list providing information about dynamite. the text states that dynamite is sold in the form of a stick, is approximately 20 cm in length and 2.5 cm in diameter, has 60% greater energy density than tnt, and is the main use of dynamite in mining and construction. the dynamite stick is depicted in a realistic style with a brown color and a black label with white text. the background is a gradient of gray tones, and there are abstract shapes resembling explosions in red and orange hues at the top right corner.
